nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: POST /webhook/run-cycle to start a full iteration. Optional body: {"persona_id": "persona_budget", "improve": true}

nodes.name: Loop 1 — Run Call
nodes.notes: Runs run_call.py. Update the path to match your deployment.

nodes.name: Loop 2 — Analyze Call
nodes.notes: Runs analyze_call.py with the call_id from Loop 1.

nodes.name: Loop 3 — Improve Script
nodes.notes: Runs improve_script.py. Only executes if should_improve=true.

_meta.readme: Import this file into n8n via Settings > Import Workflow. Update the path in each Execute Command node to point to your binox-g1 directory. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in n8n's environment variables or prefix each command with 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-... '.
